summary.boundary: Figure audit only; it does not create new scientific evidence.

figures.role: packed-bed transport diagnostic separating breakthrough from pore-network clogging
figures.reviewer_risk: Useful as an argument map, but should not replace quantitative evidence in Figs. 2-7.
figures.claim_boundary: Mechanism overview only; detailed quantitative claims are supported by Figs. 2-4 and source tables.

figures.role: baseline voxel-derived pore topology
figures.reviewer_risk: Keep as a core figure for the CES mechanism story.
figures.claim_boundary: DEM-derived voxel reconstruction, not experimental CT.

figures.role: representative drive-state transport and blockage mechanism
figures.reviewer_risk: Keep as a core figure for the CES mechanism story.
figures.claim_boundary: Supports pre-clogging migration/filtering states, not critical pore collapse.

figures.role: time-resolved deposition, front migration and delayed weak breakthrough in the representative case
figures.reviewer_risk: Representative time-resolved post-processing; caption and text must avoid universal speed-law or critical-transition claims.
figures.claim_boundary: Representative time-resolved case only; supports delayed leading-tail breakthrough, not a universal speed law or critical-clogging threshold.

figures.role: loading-dependent BTC, blockage and pressure-free clogging index
figures.reviewer_risk: Single-seed loading scan; caption and text must avoid monotonic law or transition claims.
figures.claim_boundary: Does not establish a monotonic loading law or critical transition.

figures.role: high-inventory localized-release population splitting and sparse-front saturation
figures.reviewer_risk: High-inventory 908 mechanism evidence; caption and text must avoid completed-BTC, outlet-breakthrough or critical-clogging claims.
figures.claim_boundary: Supports near-outlet sparse-front saturation and retained-bulk decoupling at the completed 10.00 ms high-inventory frame; not outlet breakthrough, not a fitted source-strength law and not critical clogging.

figures.role: time-resolved localized-release retention, downstream leakage and sparse-front separation
figures.reviewer_risk: Time-resolved localized-release mechanism evidence; caption and text must avoid source-position scaling-law or critical-clogging claims.
figures.claim_boundary: Visualizes DEM tracking of localized-release cases; not a fitted source-position law and not a pressure-calibrated clogging threshold.

figures.role: main-text OpenFOAM cropped-domain model and mesh context for returned pressure checks
figures.reviewer_risk: Main-text OpenFOAM cropped-domain model/mesh context; caption and text must avoid validation, full-device CFD or pressure-calibrated Ib claims.
figures.claim_boundary: Documents the cropped-domain OpenFOAM model and mesh context only; not new pressure evidence, not experimental validation and not pressure calibration for Ib.

figures.role: cross-observable mechanism synthesis across drive, localized-release and loading axes
figures.reviewer_risk: Derived cross-observable synthesis; caption and text must avoid fitted-law, CFD-validation or pressure-calibrated threshold claims.
figures.claim_boundary: Synthesizes existing DEM and voxel post-processing outputs; not a fitted response law, not CFD validation and not a pressure-calibrated critical-clogging criterion.

figures.role: cross-case response landscape separating transport, deposition, source-release, pressure-proxy and topology observables
figures.reviewer_risk: Derived cross-case visualization; caption and text must avoid fitting sparse case families as a universal law.

figures.role: time-resolved high-inventory sparse-front diagnostics for localized release case 908
figures.reviewer_risk: 908 monitoring-window diagnostic; caption and text must avoid completed-breakthrough or critical-clogging claims.
figures.claim_boundary: Supports retained-bulk and rare-front separation for the completed 908 target-time window; not outlet breakthrough and not a critical-clogging threshold.

figures.role: voxel-size sensitivity
figures.reviewer_risk: Supports reconstruction robustness; keep in supplement rather than main text.

figures.role: voxel coarsening stress test
figures.reviewer_risk: Supports reconstruction robustness; keep in supplement rather than main text.
